summary: Workflow fails critical requirements: actions pinned to versions (v4, v5) not SHAs, references missing fixtures and test file, no actionlint/act validation shown, no act-result.txt artifact. Python script itself solid (type hints, error handling, clear comments) but incomplete ecosystem. Aggregation logic duplicated (lines 68-71, 112-115, aggregate_results ~136-139 all count passed/failed/skipped—extract to helper). Workflow would not run; won't ship.
